prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第144名持续上升至2026年第87名，近年排名大幅跃升 ，综合实力和认可度显著提升；2023年曾因教师不配合核酸检测事件出现偏负面舆情；2024年声誉转为中性/混合，分数线持续上涨引发关注；抖音热度为较热 （总排名第32位），短视频平台曝光度较高，报考关注度升温。未见明显投档断档记录；海南大学以农林、海洋、法学为特色，但作为热带农业和海洋领域的重要高校，相关学科具有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热；本 省2026年物理类考生估算约31.3万人，较2025年减少约2.4%，竞争略有缓解；海南大学位于海南省海口市，对安徽考生属 于跨省报考，近年该校在安徽招生占比约1.5%-4%，2025年物理类计划514人、历史类86人，安徽为该校重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次36298名、2026 年计划小幅缩招（-0.78%）、软科排名持续大幅上升（第144→87名）、抖音热度较热等因素，学校层次提升和报考关注度升温对位次的上移作用略强于缩招带来的竞争加剧效应；预测2026年物理类最低位次约36329名，区间35829–36829名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 42377 → 49740 → 50299 → 36735 → 36298. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly advanced to 36735, and further advanced to 36298 in 2025, with a cumulative advancement of about 13999 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 36298. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 405 in 2021 → 437 in 2022 → 432 in 2023 → 463 in 2024 → 514 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 510, a decrease of 4 (-0.78%) compared to 2025, indicating a slight contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, greatly enhancing its comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident involving teachers not cooperating with nucleic acid testing. In 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed, with rising admission scores attracting attention. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 32nd overall), with high exposure on short video platforms, increasing application interest. No obvious enrollment gaps were recorded. Hainan University is characterized by agriculture, forestry, marine sciences, and law, and as an important university in tropical agriculture and marine fields, its related disciplines have certain appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 313,000, a decrease of approximately 2.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, and for Anhui candidates, it is an inter-provincial application. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui has been about 1.5%-4%. In 2025, the Physics Category plan is 514 and the History Category plan is 86, making Anhui one of the important source provinces for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 36298, the slight enrollment contraction in 2026 (-0.78%), the continuous significant rise in Soft Science ranking (144→87), and the relatively high Douyin popularity, the upward effect on ranking from the university's level improvement and increased application interest slightly outweighs the intensified competition from contraction. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 36329, with a range of 35829–36829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 35829–36829, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choices, aim for Tier 1 majors as reach options, and use Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 35800), focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information Engineering. If the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 36800), mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Software Engineering and Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, with Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering and Agronomy as safe backups.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 4915 → 9355 → 5264 → 6331 → 5893. In 2022, due to batch merger, there was a significant backward shift (9355th place), recovering to 5264th in 2023. In recent three years, it fluctuated between 5264 and 6331, with a baseline of about 5893 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 67 in 2021 → 100 in 2022 → 102 in 2023 → 86 in 2024 → 86 in 2025, stabilizing around 86 in recent years. The 2026 plan is 82, a decrease of 4 (-4.65%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with a substantial leap in recent years, significantly enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident due to a teacher's non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing. In 2024, reputation turned neutral/mixed, with rising admission scores attracting attention. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 32nd overall), with high exposure on short video platforms, increasing application attention. No obvious gaps in admission records were observed. Hainan University's law is a traditionally advantageous major. Although data for A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation is missing, law has the best ranking in historical admissions (approximately 3285th in 2025), with strong appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as law and Chinese language and literature are socially popular, with law having obvious advantages for civil service exams. The estimated number of history category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 138,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 2025, slightly easing competition. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, and is an out-of-province application for Anhui examinees. In recent years, the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui's liberal arts category has been about 2%-4%. In 2025, the history category plan was 86, making Anhui one of the important source provinces for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5893, the 2026 enrollment reduction (-4.65%), the continuous significant rise in Soft Science ranking (144th to 87th), and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, the reduction rate is greater than the decrease in examinees, and the improvement in school level and rising application attention further push up the ranking. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will be approximately 5809, with a range of 5309–6309.
